seed_data_creation: Created multiple VINYL_MOOD posts for all 12 moods during backend testing. Created TEST ISO during frontend testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two new features fully tested: (1) Vinyl Mood modal now has 12 moods with dynamic styling - each mood changes modal background color, button text, button color, and note placeholder. Feed cards display mood posts with emoji + mood name + mood-specific color. (2) Marketplace photo upload - listings require 1-10 photos. Backend validates via Pydantic (min_length=1, max_length=10). Frontend has photo upload section with camera icon and '(1-10 required)' label. Submit button disabled without photos. Existing listings (created before this feature) return empty photo_urls array for backward compatibility. The /api/upload endpoint exists for file uploads but EMERGENT_LLM_KEY may not be set so actual file upload might fail in testing.

features: 12 moods: Late Night, Sunday Morning, Rainy Day, Road Trip, Golden Hour, Deep Focus, Party Mode, Lazy Afternoon, Melancholy, Upbeat Vibes, Cozy Evening, Workout
Each mood has unique emoji, background color, button color, button text, placeholder
Selected mood card has colored border (2px solid) + 15% opacity fill
Button shows 'pick a mood first' in grey (#cccccc) before selection
Dynamic modal background per mood (e.g., Late Night #1a1230, Sunday Morning #fff8e8, Golden Hour #2a1a08)
Dynamic button text (e.g., 'Post your Late Night mood')
Dynamic placeholder (e.g., Late Night: 'what are you listening to at this hour?', Road Trip: 'where are you headed?')
Feed cards show emoji + mood name in mood-specific colored pill
Backend ListingCreate model requires photo_urls: List[str] (1-10 required)
Backend validates: 422 for missing/empty photo_urls, 422 for >10 photos
Backend ListingResponse includes photo_urls: List[str] = []
Existing listings without photos return empty array (backward compatible)
Frontend List for Sale modal has photo upload section with '(1-10 required)' label
Frontend 'Add photos' button with camera icon
Frontend submit button disabled without photos
Frontend ListingCard supports photo carousel with prev/next buttons for multi-photo listings
New ISO creation with Discogs search and manual entry
Three tabs: ISO, Market, My Listings
ISO cards with mark found and delete actions
Market tab shows listing cards with album art

Late Night.placeholder: what are you listening to at this hour?
